summary: Completed testing of encrypted local storage functionality using Web Crypto API with AES-GCM encryption. Core encryption features working correctly with some UI navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog navigation between tabs inconsistent - sometimes closes or resets when switching between Authentication and Encryption tabs

integration_issues.issue: Security button in navigation requires force click or JavaScript click to work - normal click fails due to hidden state

passed_tests: Web Crypto API support verification - AES-GCM encryption available
Basic encrypt/decrypt functionality using 256-bit AES-GCM keys
SecureStorage class simulation for encrypted localStorage
Data migration button existence and click functionality
Storage statistics calculation (encrypted vs unencrypted items)
Encryption key generation and storage simulation
Security Settings dialog opening and tab navigation
localStorage basic functionality and encrypted prefix handling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Security Settings dialog tab navigation consistency. The Encryption tab sometimes doesn't stay active or the dialog closes unexpectedly when switching tabs. Also improve the Security navigation button accessibility - it appears hidden and requires force click.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Core encryption functionality works, UI navigation has issues
